stats.title: Trusted by Filipino families worldwide

cards.quote: I switched because my family receives more pesos every month. Transfers land quickly and support is always responsive.
Finally a remittance app with clear pricing. No surprises, and my parents get updates in real-time.
The recurring transfer setup is a game changer. Tuition payments are now on autopilot.
Bank transfer and GCash payout both worked smoothly for my family. The app feels built for OFWs.

security.title: Security-first, always
security.alwaysSubtitle: Protecting your money at every step
security.point1: Proactive fraud detection 24x7, with layered authentication and risk monitoring.
security.point2: Customer funds safeguarded in segregated accounts with regulated financial institutions.
security.point3: 24x7 customer support via in-app chat, email, and phone.

gateway.title: Your gateway to the Philippines: Send, Pay, Save.
gateway.feature1Body: Hold USD, EUR, or SGD and grow your savings with competitive annual yields.
gateway.feature2Body: Schedule utilities, tuition, and government contribution payments in one workflow.
gateway.feature3Body: Set recurring transfers for monthly support, investments, or emergency reserves.

finalCta.title: Your world. Your money. Get the Aspora app.
finalCta.subtitle: Move money home in minutes with transparent pricing and OFW-first support.

footer.regulatory: Aspora Inc. is a U.S. money services business partner network. Philippine payouts are delivered through licensed banking and e-money partners supervised by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP).
